name: WooCommerce REST API
what_it_does: WordPress-based ecommerce plugin with a REST API for managing products, orders, customers, coupons, and store settings on self-hosted WooCommerce stores.
use_cases: Managing product catalog and inventory via REST API in agent workflows
Processing and updating order status programmatically
Syncing customer data between WooCommerce and external systems
Automating coupon creation and discount management
Generating sales reports via the reporting API
not_for: Stores not running WordPress (use Shopify or BigCommerce)
High-performance storefronts needing sub-100ms API responses
best_when: Your store runs on WooCommerce/WordPress and you need API-driven automation without switching platforms.
avoid_when: You need a managed hosted ecommerce platform or aren't running WordPress.

auth.notes: Consumer key + consumer secret via Basic auth over HTTPS, or OAuth 1.0a for HTTP. HTTPS required for Basic auth. Simple key pair generated in WP admin.

pricing.free_tier_limits: WooCommerce plugin is free and open source
pricing.paid_tiers: Extensions and plugins are paid separately; hosting is separate cost
pricing.notes: WooCommerce itself is free. Hosting costs vary. Many premium extensions needed for advanced features. Payment gateway fees apply separately.

performance.rate_limits: No built-in rate limits; depends on hosting server capacity

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard WP REST API errors with code and message. Quality varies as it depends on WP and server config.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No built-in idempotency. Product and order creation may create duplicates on retry.
known_agent_gotchas: API performance depends entirely on hosting quality - cheap shared hosting causes timeouts
No built-in rate limiting - agent can overload a poorly resourced server
OAuth 1.0a (for non-HTTPS) is complex to implement correctly
WordPress plugins can break the REST API - agents must handle unexpected errors
No idempotency support - duplicate API calls create duplicate orders/products
